config.adaptivemobai.option.loadout.empt: parma-sista: yuhtien i coa yahtië armaron i mod sin ahyane
config.adaptivemobai.option.loadout.defa: sanya: harya i macil arwa i mob samë sínome
config.adaptivemobai.option.loadout.none: úqua: sahta i mob auta ú armë
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.root.mob_ai: Latya i pantë sundocarmë ilya mob vanilla-iva. Eruanna mob, ar enta vista i AI ar i loadout-háve.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.root.advanc: Latya i sundocarmë mobin modditain. Símen cenil i nótië-mahtalë profile itë antaina auto ar i overrides ilya mobeo.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.root.disabl: Vista loadout armaron ilyala on var off. An ú-calta, i raitë loadout Adaptive Mob AI-ava maruvant. An calta, i mobs haryuvar i yúyo vanilla-iva. Sina sundo ná off ve sanya ar enquetë-lúta sahtienna.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.common.canc: Pusta sina palantírë ú savien i vírië ahyane.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.advanced.au: An sina calta, entities modditain ú manual override haryuvar auto nótië-mahtalë profile mára.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.single.load: Latya i pencë loadout armaron. I parma-sista usë i coa yahtië armaron i mod sin ahyane, i sanya-sista harya i armë i mob samë, ar i úqua-sista sahta i pusta ú armë.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.single.enha: Vista sina mob et Adaptive Mob AI-háve ar i yára vanilla AI.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.single.tact: Estelia override nótië-mahtalë profile sin moben, hya auta i mod cilta auto lyenna.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.single.clea: Hehta i nótië-mahtalë profile i panyaina mánen ar nanwenna i sanya hya auto ciltalë.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.loadouts.we: Eruanna i armë-ranco %s. I parma-sista usë i coa yahtië armaron i mod sin ahyane, i sanya-sista harya i armë i mob samë, ar i úqua-sista sahta i pusta ú armë.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.loadouts.de: Cilta i pilin sanya itë anta i mobs i usir quinga hya crossbow an úqua pilin override eressë i sina moben.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.loadouts.mo: Estelia pilin hya crossbow ammo override i erda mob i ciltaina. Ve sanya, i pilin-sundo ilyala usë.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.loadouts.sa: Tec i sundocarmë loadout ahyane mir adaptivemobai-common.toml ar enquetë-lúta sahtienna.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.loadouts.ca: Pusta i pencë loadout ú savien i vírië ahyane.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.per_mob.ove: Calta hya ú-calta i AI override nórë ilya moben.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.per_mob.sho: Vista an i vanilla entity ID nar cenaina mi i rollo ó i modditain.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.per_mob.set: Sahta i mob ciltaina harya i vanilla AI. Adaptive Mob AI ú naptuva i mahta-sanië mentassen.
Sahta i mob ciltaina usë i háve Adaptive Mob AI.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.per_mob.cle: Hehta i AI override i mob ciltaina ar nanwenna i háve sanya i mod-ava.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.modded.mapp: Turë quentë manen entities modditain mapuvant nótië-mahtalë profilenna.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.modded.auto: An sina calta, entities modditain ú manual override haryuvar auto nótië-mahtalë profile mára.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.modded.show: Vista an entities vanilla nar cenaina mi sina rollo ó entities modditain.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.modded.set_: Anta eressë nótië-mahtalë profile i entity ciltaina.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.modded.clea: Hehta i override nótië-mahtalë i entity ciltaina ar nanwenna i háve auto hya sanya.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.modded.defa: Cilta i profile nótië-mahtalë tulca an hostile mobs modditain an úqua neca mára.
Cilta i profile nótië-mahtalë tulca an passive mobs modditain an úqua neca mára.
